prompt: A photorealistic close-up portrait of a small tabby kitten styled like an early-2000s pop-punk rocker, sitting on a dark floor and facing the camera with a calm, slightly soulful expression. The kitten has large round eyes, soft striped fur, and long straight scene-kid hair in {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} with a bold {argument name="streak color" default="pink"} streak draped over one side of the face, partially covering one eye. It wears 4 visible fashion elements: a black band-style shirt with a distressed white graphic, a black-and-pink diagonal striped necktie, a black studded bracelet on one front paw, and the dramatic long wig-like hairstyle. The background is a gritty bedroom or rehearsal-space wall covered with punk posters and distressed textures; on the left is a black poster with large white text reading {argument name="poster text" default="AVRIL LAVIGNE"} above a pink heart-and-crossbones symbol, and on the right is a blurred poster of a person in dark clothing with a striped tie. Moody warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, highly detailed fur, realistic whiskers, subtle grunge atmosphere, centered composition, nostalgic emo aesthetic, studio-quality realism.
translatedPrompt: 一张逼真的小猫特写肖像，造型模仿 21 世纪初的流行朋克摇滚歌手，它坐在深色地板上，面朝镜头，表情冷静且略带忧郁。小猫有着圆圆的大眼睛、柔软的条纹毛发，以及一头长直的“场景小孩”（scene-kid）风格发型，颜色为 {argument name="hair color" default="铂金色"}，一侧脸颊垂下一缕醒目的 {argument name="streak color" default="粉色"} 发丝，遮住了部分眼睛。它佩戴了 4 个显眼的时尚元素：一件带有做旧白色图案的黑色乐队风格 T 恤、一条黑粉斜条纹领带、一只前爪上戴着黑色铆钉手环，以及那头夸张的长假发式发型。背景是贴满朋克海报且充满做旧质感的粗犷卧室或排练室墙壁；左侧是一张黑色海报，上面印有醒目的白色文字 {argument name="poster text" default="AVRIL LAVIGNE"}，下方是一个粉色的心形骷髅标志；右侧是一张模糊的海报，上面是一个穿着深色衣服、系着条纹领带的人。昏暗的室内暖光，浅景深，毛发细节丰富，胡须逼真，带有微妙的颓废氛围，居中构图，怀旧的情绪美学，影棚级写实效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 流行朋克情绪风小猫肖像：此提示词可生成一张具有情绪流行朋克风格的逼真小猫肖像，非常适合用于幽默的音乐主题角色艺术或病毒式社交媒体图片。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
